2023-24 Boise State Broncos Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 22-11 (13-5, 2nd in MWC MBB)

Coach: Leon Rice

PS/G: 75.1 (128th of 362)

PA/G: 67.3 (53rd of 362)

SRS: 13.31 (45th of 362)

SOS: 7.35 (72nd of 362)

ORtg: 111.4 (65th of 362)

DRtg: 99.8 (74th of 362)

Preseason Odds: Championship +25000

NCAA Tournament: (#10 seed in South)
Lost South First Four (60-53) versus #10 Colorado
